guidelines: Align numbers to the right, text to the left
Include row actions (edit, delete) in a consistent location
Support pagination or virtual scrolling for large datasets
colorGuidance: Alternating row backgrounds for readability (subtle, 2-3% opacity difference)
Highlight selected rows with brand accent at low opacity
typographyGuidance: Header: 12-14px, bold or medium, uppercase optional
Numeric data: tabular figures, monospace optional
spacingGuidance: Toolbar: 12-16px padding with 8-12px gap between actions
commonMistakes: Columns too wide or too narrow without resize ability
No loading state for data fetching
Missing empty state when filters return no results
Horizontal scrolling without sticky first column
qualityChecklist: Bulk actions work with row selection
Table is responsive or has horizontal scroll with pinned columns
